text_block_list.text: With the nature of Royce and Royce's preparations still a mystery—— The day of the all-or-nothing tryouts arrived, without a single trainer having seen her practice.
Her opponents included Biwa Hayahide, Winning Ticket, and Narita Taishin. How would she race in the face of those rivals…? With the long wait over, the tryouts began.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
(Good. I'm right in position behind Hayahide-san. 
Ticket-san and Taishin-san are staying in the rear like I predicted.)

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: (…Hopefully I can keep it that way to the end…)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I couldn't catch up when we were partner running—— 
So this time, I'm gonna get the jump on you! Here I cooooome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaaaaahhhhhhhhh!!!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
——So you're making your move. 
But not if I can help it! Hragh!!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Kgh…! Me too…! Haaahh…!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That win is mine. Hut——!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Huff, huff…! 
…Huff… pant… pant……!
Royce and Royce kept a good position through the middle of the race, but she fell behind in the home stretch, and ended up finishing fourth…

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text:
"How'd you like to chase the Derby with me, Winning Ticket?" 
"Narita Taishin, can we talk?" 
"Do you have a moment, Biwa Hayahide?"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Woaoaoaah! A-Are you ALL here to scout us!? 
Oh, gosh, what do we do!?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I am ever so sorry, could I trouble you to speak one by one?

text_block_list.name: Mid-Career Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Royce and Royce wasn't too bad either, but… 
When I think about the stunt she pulled before the race… 
She seems a little too hard to deal with.
If she didn't have the results to back it up, it was only natural people would think Royce's declaration was just her being performative.
As she withdrew to the underground passage, she wore a solemn expression, completely unlike the goofy girl I had come to expect. Something about it tugged at my heartstrings…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
…What is it? 
I assume you're not here to scout me.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: It's exactly as I explained. I wanted them to judge my performance at the actual race. …I couldn't have them writing me off just by seeing my practice.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I thought I had a chance if I made a big enough impact… 
…But I suppose things are never so easy.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Of course. First, I have to catch the trainers' attention. I can demonstrate my racing skills after that. There's no skipping the first step of getting my foot in the door.
But there were times where her self-production backfired on her, like the incident with the contacts and her decision to practice in private.
choice_data_list: If you focused on training instead…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: If I did, do you think they would have scouted me?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Can you really say you would have remembered me? 
Even after you saw how much potential and talent Hayahide-san and the others have? Be honest.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
If I just ran, without doing anything else… 
You wouldn't even be here talking to me. 
——Am I wrong?

I couldn't say it. 
Not after watching that race…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
…Haha. Aren't you the honest one. 
You were worried about me, and came to check in on me, didn't you? I suppose your kindness deserves something in return.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: My dream is to be "the greatest".

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Yes. I want to be the sort of racer everyone wants to talk about—— "The greatest Umamusume", whose name is spoken for generations to come.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Because I was a genius. ——"Was".

text_block_list.name: Royce's Father
text_block_list.text:
You won again, Royce-chan! You're a racing genius! 
Is it just me or do we have a future GI superchamp on our hands!?

text_block_list.name: Royce's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You solved all these problems? Good girl, Royce-chan! 
You're a genius! You're going to have your name in the history books!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Yes. I was only "genius" in the way every parent thinks their children are. But when I was young, I really did believe I was a genius.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
One day, I saw something on TV. 
It was a special feature, asking "Who is the greatest Umamusume to you?"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: One of the Umamusume they named had long since retired. But when they spoke about her, their words were full of passion, saying that even now, they could never forget her racing…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
——And I thought I'd found the perfect title for a "genius" like me. To be a legend spoken of for generations… 
To be "the greatest Umamusume".

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
But then, at a race for little kids, I met a real genius. 
…I was a smart kid. So I understood the reality of the situation.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
There's no shortage of Umamusume at my skill level. 
Every student at Tracen Academy was accepted because of their talent, after all.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Among those students, there are racers winning multiple GIs, racers worthy of being "the greatest"—— Just how many of those legendary talents are here at the Academy?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I'm… not one of them. 
After studying and analyzing them, I know it all too well. 
…They're on a whole nother level.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
But I still want to become the greatest. 
I want to find a trainer who can take a non-genius like me and make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I don't blame you if you have doubts about scouting me. 
You may as well be walking into hell.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
But… 
Even though Hayahide-san and the others were there, you still looked my way.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Could I… get my hopes up? …Just a little bit?
